verses.3: I will give thanks to you, LORD, among the nations.
verses.4: For your loving kindness is great above the heavens.
verses.5: Be exalted, God, above the heavens!
verses.6: That your beloved may be delivered,
verses.7: God has spoken from his sanctuary: “In triumph,
verses.8: Gilead is mine. Manasseh is mine.
verses.10: Who will bring me into the fortified city?
verses.12: Give us help against the enemy,
verses.13: Through God, we will do valiantly,
